mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier ( supplierid, number, name, abbreviation, nation, region, address, legal_person,priorityPayment, establish_date, foreign_share, manager, supplier_category, supplier_group,fdefaultContactId, supply_type, main_product, business_registration, social_credit_code, source, cause, business_license, invoice_name, customization, turnover, factory_people, behave, contact_info, follow_up_feedback, settlement_currency, factory_positioning, quality_control, factory_equipment, factory_area, factory_certification, export_market, settlement_method, payment_terms, invoice_type, tax_category, settlement_party, payee, default_tax_rate, created_by, created_at, auditor, audit_time, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{supplierid}, #{number}, #{name}, #{abbreviation}, #{nation}, #{region}, #{address}, #{legalPerson}, #{priorityPayment}, #{establishDate}, #{foreignShare}, #{manager}, #{supplierCategory}, #{supplierGroup},#{fdefaultContactId}, #{supplyType}, #{mainProduct}, #{businessRegistration}, #{socialCreditCode}, #{source}, #{cause}, #{businessLicense}, #{invoiceName}, #{customization}, #{turnover}, #{factoryPeople}, #{behave}, #{contactInfo}, #{followUpFeedback}, #{settlementCurrency}, #{factoryPositioning}, #{qualityControl}, #{factoryEquipment}, #{factoryArea}, #{factoryCertification}, #{exportMarket}, #{settlementMethod}, #{paymentTerms}, #{invoiceType}, #{taxCategory}, #{settlementParty}, #{payee}, #{defaultTaxRate}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{auditor}, #{auditTime}, #{updatedBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE supplier
supplierid = #{supplierid}, name = #{name}, abbreviation = #{abbreviation}, nation = #{nation}, region = #{region}, address = #{address}, legal_person = #{legalPerson}, establish_date = #{establishDate}, foreign_share = #{foreignShare}, manager = #{manager}, supplier_category = #{supplierCategory}, supply_type = #{supplyType}, main_product = #{mainProduct}, business_registration = #{businessRegistration}, social_credit_code = #{socialCreditCode}, source = #{source}, business_license = #{businessLicense}, invoice_name = #{invoiceName}, customization = #{customization}, turnover = #{turnover}, factory_people = #{factoryPeople}, behave = #{behave}, priorityPayment = #{priorityPayment}, contact_info = #{contactInfo}, follow_up_feedback = #{followUpFeedback}, settlement_currency = #{settlementCurrency}, factory_positioning = #{factoryPositioning}, quality_control = #{qualityControl}, factory_equipment = #{factoryEquipment}, factory_area = #{factoryArea}, factory_certification = #{factoryCertification}, export_market = #{exportMarket}, settlement_method = #{settlementMethod}, payment_terms = #{paymentTerms}, invoice_type = #{invoiceType}, tax_category = #{taxCategory}, settlement_party = #{settlementParty}, payee = #{payee}, default_tax_rate = #{defaultTaxRate}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, auditor = #{auditor}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, fdefaultContactId = #{fdefaultContactId},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE number = #{number}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.number, s.name, s.abbreviation, s.nation, s.region, s.priorityPayment, s.address, s.legal_person AS legalPerson, s.establish_date AS establishDate, s.foreign_share AS foreignShare, u_manager.fname AS manager, d_supplier_category.name AS supplierCategory, d_supply_type.name AS supplyType, s.main_product AS mainProduct, s.business_registration AS businessRegistration, s.social_credit_code AS socialCreditCode, s.settlement_party as settlementParty, s.payee, d_supplier_source.name AS source, s.cause, s.business_license AS businessLicense, s.invoice_name AS invoiceName, s.customization, s.turnover, s.factory_people AS factoryPeople, u_auditor.user_name AS auditor, s.audit_time AS auditTime, s.behave, s.contact_info AS contactInfo, s.follow_up_feedback AS followUpFeedback, s.factory_positioning AS factoryPositioning, s.quality_control AS qualityControl, s.factory_equipment AS factoryEquipment, s.factory_area AS factoryArea, s.factory_certification AS factoryCertification, s.export_market AS exportMarket, d_currency.name AS settlementCurrency, sm.name AS settlementMethod, d_payment_terms.name AS paymentTerms, d_invoice_type.name AS invoiceType, byd.name AS taxCategory, tar.name AS defaultTaxRate, u_created.user_name AS createdBy, sg.group_name as supplierGroup, s.supplierid, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_by AS updatedBy, s.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM supplier s LEFT JOIN sys_employee u_manager ON s.manager = u_manager.fid LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supplier_category ON s.supplier_category = d_supplier_category.kingdee AND d_supplier_category.category_name = '供应商分类' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supplier_source ON s.source = d_supplier_source.kingdee AND d_supplier_source.category_name = '供应商来源' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supply_type ON s.supply_type = d_supply_type.kingdee AND d_supply_type.category_name = '供应类别' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_currency ON s.settlement_currency = d_currency.kingdee AND d_currency.category_name = '币别' LEFT JOIN settlement_method sm ON s.settlement_method = sm.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_payment_terms ON s.payment_terms = d_payment_terms.kingdee AND d_payment_terms.category_name = '付款条件' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_invoice_type ON s.invoice_type = d_invoice_type.kingdee AND d_invoice_type.category_name = '发票类型' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd ON s.tax_category = byd.kingdee AND byd.category_name = '税分类' LEFT JOIN tax_rate tar ON s.default_tax_rate = tar.k3_code LEFT JOIN sys_user u_created ON s.created_by = u_created.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user u_update ON s.updated_by = u_update.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user u_auditor ON s.auditor = u_auditor.k3_key LEFT JOIN supplier_groups sg ON s.supplier_group = sg.k3_id WHERE s.id = #{number}
SELECT supplierid, number, name FROM supplier WHERE supplierid = #{supplierid}

SELECT s.id, s.number, s.name, s.abbreviation, c.name_zh as nation, s.region, s.priorityPayment, s.address, s.legal_person AS legalPerson, s.establish_date AS establishDate, s.foreign_share AS foreignShare, u_manager.fname AS manager, d_supplier_category.name AS supplierCategory, d_supply_type.name AS supplyType, s.main_product AS mainProduct, s.business_registration AS businessRegistration, s.social_credit_code AS socialCreditCode, s.settlement_party as settlementParty, s.payee, d_supplier_source.name AS source, s.cause, s.business_license AS businessLicense, s.invoice_name AS invoiceName, s.customization, s.turnover, s.factory_people AS factoryPeople, u_auditor.user_name AS auditor, s.audit_time AS auditTime, s.behave, s.contact_info AS contactInfo, s.follow_up_feedback AS followUpFeedback, s.factory_positioning AS factoryPositioning, s.quality_control AS qualityControl, s.factory_equipment AS factoryEquipment, s.factory_area AS factoryArea, s.factory_certification AS factoryCertification, s.export_market AS exportMarket, d_currency.name AS settlementCurrency, sm.name AS settlementMethod, d_payment_terms.name AS paymentTerms, d_invoice_type.name AS invoiceType, byd.name AS taxCategory, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT f.bank_account SEPARATOR ',') AS bankAccount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT f.receiving_bank SEPARATOR ',') AS receivingBank, tar.name AS defaultTaxRate, u_created.user_name AS createdBy, sg.group_name, s.supplierid, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_by AS updatedBy, s.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM supplier s LEFT JOIN sys_employee u_manager ON s.manager = u_manager.fid LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supplier_category ON s.supplier_category = d_supplier_category.kingdee AND d_supplier_category.category_name = '供应商分类' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supplier_source ON s.source = d_supplier_source.kingdee AND d_supplier_source.category_name = '供应商来源' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supply_type ON s.supply_type = d_supply_type.kingdee AND d_supply_type.category_name = '供应类别' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_currency ON s.settlement_currency = d_currency.kingdee AND d_currency.category_name = '币别' LEFT JOIN settlement_method sm ON s.settlement_method = sm.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_payment_terms ON s.payment_terms = d_payment_terms.kingdee AND d_payment_terms.category_name = '付款条件' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_invoice_type ON s.invoice_type = d_invoice_type.kingdee AND d_invoice_type.category_name = '发票类型' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd ON s.tax_category = byd.kingdee AND byd.category_name = '税分类' LEFT JOIN tax_rate tar ON s.default_tax_rate = tar.k3_code LEFT JOIN sys_user u_created ON s.created_by = u_created.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user u_update ON s.updated_by = u_update.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user u_auditor ON s.auditor = u_auditor.k3_key LEFT JOIN supplier_groups sg ON s.supplier_group = sg.k3_id LEFT JOIN financial_information f ON s.number = f.supplier_number LEFT JOIN country c on s.nation= c.id
1=1
AND number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.number}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.name}, '%')
AND sg.group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.groupName}, '%')
AND s.supplier_group = #{supplier.supplierGroup}
AND s.main_product LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.mainProduct}, '%')
AND d_supplier_category.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.supplierCategory}, '%')
AND u_manager.fname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.manager}, '%')
GROUP BY s.id, s.number, s.name, s.abbreviation, s.nation, s.region, s.priorityPayment, s.address, s.legal_person, s.establish_date, s.foreign_share, u_manager.fname, d_supplier_category.name, d_supply_type.name, s.main_product, s.business_registration, s.social_credit_code, s.settlement_party, s.payee, d_supplier_source.name, s.cause, s.business_license, s.invoice_name, s.customization, s.turnover, s.factory_people, u_auditor.user_name, s.audit_time, s.behave, s.contact_info, s.follow_up_feedback, s.factory_positioning, s.quality_control, s.factory_equipment, s.factory_area, s.factory_certification, s.export_market, d_currency.name, sm.name, d_payment_terms.name, d_invoice_type.name, byd.name, tar.name, u_created.user_name, sg.group_name, s.supplierid, s.created_at, s.updated_by, s.updated_at ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT id, number, name, abbreviation, nation, region, address, legal_person AS legalPerson,auditor,audit_time AS auditTime, establish_date AS establishDate, foreign_share AS foreignShare, manager, supplier_category AS supplierCategory, supply_type AS supplyType, main_product AS mainProduct, business_registration AS businessRegistration, social_credit_code AS socialCreditCode, source, cause, business_license AS businessLicense, supplier_group, invoice_name AS invoiceName, customization, turnover, factory_people AS factoryPeople, behave, contact_info AS contactInfo, follow_up_feedback AS followUpFeedback, settlement_currency AS settlementCurrency, factory_positioning AS factoryPositioning, quality_control AS qualityControl, factory_equipment AS factoryEquipment, factory_area AS factoryArea, factory_certification AS factoryCertification, export_market AS exportMarket, settlement_method AS settlementMethod, payment_terms AS paymentTerms, invoice_type AS invoiceType, tax_category AS taxCategory, settlement_party AS settlementParty, payee, default_tax_rate AS defaultTaxRate, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_by AS updatedBy, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM supplier WHERE supplierid = #{supplierid}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier s LEFT JOIN sys_employee u_manager ON s.manager = u_manager.fid LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supplier_category ON s.supplier_category = d_supplier_category.kingdee AND d_supplier_category.category_name = '供应商分类' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supplier_source ON s.source = d_supplier_source.kingdee AND d_supplier_source.category_name = '供应商来源' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_supply_type ON s.supply_type = d_supply_type.kingdee AND d_supply_type.category_name = '供应类别' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_currency ON s.settlement_currency = d_currency.kingdee AND d_currency.category_name = '币别' LEFT JOIN settlement_method sm ON s.settlement_method = sm.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_payment_terms ON s.payment_terms = d_payment_terms.kingdee AND d_payment_terms.category_name = '付款条件' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_invoice_type ON s.invoice_type = d_invoice_type.kingdee AND d_invoice_type.category_name = '发票类型' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d_tax_category ON s.tax_category = d_tax_category.kingdee AND d_tax_category.category_name = '税分类' LEFT JOIN sys_user u_created ON s.created_by = u_created.k3_key LEFT JOIN supplier_groups sg ON s.supplier_group = sg.k3_id
AND number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.number}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.name}, '%')
AND sg.group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.groupName}, '%')
AND s.supplier_group = #{supplier.supplierGroup}
AND s.main_product LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.mainProduct}, '%')
AND d_supplier_category.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.supplierCategory}, '%')
AND u_manager.fname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplier.manager}, '%')
